case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DONNELL, DARLENE MC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-25-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-30-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 NEGOTIATED SETTLEMENT FOR $3500. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-06-2004, GRANTED
